message:
chore(deps): bump ort to rc.12, rustyline 12→18, zip 2→8

Continues the dependency-upgrade pass from c7f0f0f / 86fca5c by
clearing the three deferred majors that needed touch-ups beyond
Cargo.toml.

Cargo.toml
- ort           2.0.0-rc.11 → 2.0.0-rc.12
                 (ndarray comment kept; ort rc.12 still tracks
                  ndarray 0.17 so TensorRef::from_array_view stays
                  trait-bound clean)
- rustyline     12 → 18
                 (multiple breaking releases collapsed in one bump;
                  callers only needed src/repl.rs touch-up below)
- zip           2 → 8
                 (Read/Write trait reshuffle; we don't actively
                  use zip's API, only depend on it transitively
                  through frankensearch et al; bump is purely to
                  unify lockfile resolution and pull in the
                  faster libbz2-rs / lzma-rust2 / ppmd-rust pure-
                  Rust decoders that zip 8 brings in by default)

Cargo.lock regenerated; new transitive deps include cpubits,
darling/darling_core/darling_macro (rustyline 18 macros),
libbz2-rs-sys, lzma-rust2, ppmd-rust, typed-path, plus the usual
windows-sys/windows-targets refresh.

src/repl.rs
- rustyline 18 added a `kind: CmdKind` parameter to
  Highlighter::highlight_char to let highlighters distinguish input
  modes. We do not highlight (the impl returns false unconditionally)
  but the trait signature must match. Add the new `_kind:
  rustyline::highlight::CmdKind` arg.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
